summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed candidate PRs are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept independent because they need proof, review-bot resolution, maintainer/product judgment, or repair before any close/merge path.

actions.reason: Open PR with useful focused code, but not merge-ready or closable in this plan shard.
Draft PR should stay open as an independent candidate pending proof and maintainer follow-up.
Useful but broad PR with failing proof/checks and unresolved bot findings; keep as independent backlog item, not close or merge.
No closure basis in the shard; keep independent until proof/maintainer decision confirms whether it is still needed after later gateway restart work.
Independent feature PR with unresolved review findings and failed behavior proof; keep open.
Potentially useful feature PR, but product decision and real behavior proof are still missing.
Already closed; record as skipped keep_closed only.
Security-sensitive PR must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
Security-sensitive PR must be quarantined; no closure/merge recommendation from this worker.

There is a specific unresolved maintainer judgment: whether to close this open PR as superseded despite earlier maintainer evidence that some behavior was not covered, and no low-signal close permission is available.

needs_human: #56706: resolve whether to close as superseded/duplicate or keep as related after the 2026-06-14 ClawSweeper superseded finding and the earlier maintainer note that standalone TTS parsing was not covered on main.
